privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic RIS file containing 8 machine learning papers created from the ML_PAPERS array in seed_library.py. The papers are real published works (LeCun et al. 2015, Krizhevsky et al. 2012, Goodfellow et al. 2014, Vaswani et al. 2017, Silver et al. 2016, Brown et al. 2020, Devlin et al. 2019, He et al. 2016) but assembled synthetically for the task. The file is located at /home/ga/Documents/machine_learning_papers.ris. The expected range of 7-9 items is correct as the actual file contains 8 items. The collection name 'Machine Learning Papers' is queried case-insensitively against the Zotero database.
